profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:20:46 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM02993Margaret Morse Nice papers2993Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:33:04 UTC.appm >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Margaret Morse Nice papers
Nice, Margaret Morse, 1883-1974.
Margaret Morse Nice, 1883-1974.
2993
6.6 cubic feet.
1917-1968 2068191
Biographical / Historical
Margaret Morse Nice was an ornithologist.
Scope and content
Personal correspondence and manuscripts, and professional papers including subject files, correspondence, reports and manuscripts of articles related to Margaret Morse Nice's term as associate editor of "Bird Banding" and of the "Wilson Bulletin"; manuscripts for articles, lectures, radio broadcasts, etc. on ornithology; pictures and photographs; notes and drawings; printed pamphlets; and abstracts of writings by others. Correspondents include Olin Sewall Pettingill, Josselyn Van Tyne, Thomas Calderwood Stephens, Althea Rosina Sherman, and Winnifred Smith.
Scope and content
Also, reprints of articles by Margaret Morse Nice, 1924-1946, on ornithological topics.
Preferred Citation
Margaret Morse Nice papers, #2993. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Bird banding. Bird banding. Wilson bulletin. Wilson bulletin. Ornithology -- United States. Women authors. Ornithologists -- United States. Ornithologists--United States. Women authors. Ornithology--United States. Articles. Articles. Lectures. Lectures. Pettingill, Olin Sewall, 1907-2001. Nice, Margaret Morse, b. 1883. Sherman, Althea Rosina, 1853-1943. Pettingill, Olin Sewall, 1907- Stephens, T. C. (Thomas Calderwood), 1876-1948. Sherman, Althea R. (Althea Rosina), 1853-1943. Van Tyne, Josselyn, 1902-1957. Stephens, T.C. (Thomas Calderwood), 1876-1948. Sherman, Althea R. (Althea Rosina), 1853-1943. Van Tyne, Josselyn, 1902-1957. Smith, Winnifred. Smith, Winnifred.
